title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 221.310 - Humane treatment of prisoners
text:
221.310.  Humane treatment of prisoners. — It is hereby made the special duty of the court having criminal jurisdiction, at each term, to inquire and see that all prisoners are humanely treated.
(RSMo 1939 § 9206) 
Prior revisions:  1929 § 8537; 1919 § 12562; 1909 § 1584
